sentences.arabic: كَانَ النَّبِيُّ ﷺ يُعَامِلُ جِيرَانَهُ بِكُلِّ لُطْفٍ وَإِحْسَانٍ وَكَرَمٍ.
sentences.translation: Poslanik, s.a.v.s., se prema svojim komšijama ophodio sa puno ljubaznosti, dobročinstva i plemenitosti.
sentences.translationEn: The Prophet ﷺ used to treat his neighbors with all kindness, benevolence, and generosity.

sentences.arabic: قَالَ رَسُولُ اللهِ ﷺ: «مَنْ كَانَ يُؤْمِنُ بِاللهِ وَالْيَوْمِ الْآخِرِ فَلْيُحْسِنْ إِلَى جَارِهِ» [رَوَاهُ مُسْلِمٌ فِي كِتَابِ الْإِيمَانِ].
sentences.translation: Allahov Poslanik, s.a.v.s., je rekao: 'Ko vjeruje u Allaha i Sudnji dan, neka čini dobro svome komšiji' [Bilježi Muslim u Knjizi o imanu].
sentences.translationEn: The Messenger of Allah ﷺ said: 'Whoever believes in Allah and the Last Day, let him be good to his neighbor' [Narrated by Muslim in the Book of Faith].

sentences.arabic: يَدُلُّ هَذَا الْحَدِيثُ عَلَى أَنَّ الْإِيمَانَ لَيْسَ عِبَادَةً فَقَطْ، بَلْ هُوَ حُسْنُ خُلُقٍ أَيْضًا.
sentences.translation: Ovaj hadis ukazuje na to da vjerovanje nije samo ibadet (obožavanje), već i lijepo ponašanje.
sentences.translationEn: This hadith indicates that faith is not only worship, but also good character.

sentences.arabic: يَجِبُ عَلَى الْمُسْلِمِ أَنْ يُسَاعِدَ جَارَهُ وَلَا يُؤْذِيَهُ أَبَدًا.
sentences.translation: Musliman mora pomagati svom komšiji i nikada ga ne smije uznemiravati.
sentences.translationEn: A Muslim must help his neighbor and never harm him.

sentences.arabic: بِهَذَا السُّلُوكِ يَنْتَشِرُ الْحُبُّ وَالسَّلَامُ بَيْنَ النَّاسِ جَمِيعًا.
sentences.translation: Ovakvim ponašanjem se širi ljubav i mir među svim ljudima.
sentences.translationEn: Through this behavior, love and peace spread among all people.
